full_text:
Cao Jian 曹鑒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jian (曹鑒). Enfeoffed, and died without any achievements. Cao Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Jian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
